title: Rob's Guns
body:
This is my first mod so it may be a little buggy.

My mod Rob's Guns aims to add a variety of vanilla friendly guns to the game.

The mods adds 5 guns and 1 ammo type.
- Flintlock: A single-handed quick loading gun that does moderate damage.
- Musket: A two-handed reliable gun that dishes out good damage.
- Scoped Musket: A More accurate and powerful musket equipped with a scope.
- Blunderbuss: The blunderbuss is a shotgun that shoots a flurry of bullets more reliable from closer ranges.
- Dragons Breath: The dragons breath is a single-handed shotgun that releases a flurry of flaming shots.

Useful Information:
- All guns require gunpowder and a round ball to shoot.
- Guns with the flame enchant will no longer need gunpowder to shoot.
- Scoped guns will zoom in on right click and shoot upon release.
